s1_note: 78 MIDI notes (Indian notation, _transpose(-7) applied by native).
s2_note: 86 tokens (Indian notation, _transpose not applied). Includes /5 ratio and X non-terminal in output — filter issue.
s1_vs_s2_note: S2 produit 0 MIDI events. Les tokens sont produits mais pas convertis en MIDI.
s2_vs_s3_note: 86 vs 85 tokens. _transpose(-7) changes pitch resolution affecting RND pattern matching.
